hero.badge: AI operating system for social networks
hero.title: An AI team that runs your Telegram channel for you
hero.subtitle: Not a scheduler, not «another ChatGPT». A team of AI agents ideates, writes, publishes and analyses — around the clock, in your brand voice, under your control.
hero.trust: No card · First AI post in 15 minutes · Telegram-focused

pillars.title: Why it works differently
pillars.subtitle: Three principles that set us apart from schedulers and text generators.
pillars.p1Desc: Not «click a button → a post». Describe the goal — agents do weeks of work themselves: trends, plan, copy, visuals, publishing.
pillars.p2Desc: Tone of voice, winning formats and audience live in one brand memory. Every agent checks it before any action.
pillars.p3Desc: Every AI decision can be unfolded: reasoning chain and sources. Run «AI does it» or «AI proposes — you approve».

agents.title: A team of 8 AI agents
agents.subtitle: Each owns one area. They work in a chain, coordinate and back each other up.
agents.contentDesc: Post copy, headlines and scripts in your brand voice.
agents.publisherDesc: Publishes and picks the best time for each post.
agents.analystDesc: Turns metrics into insights and recommendations, not charts.
agents.orchestratorDesc: Coordinates agent chains and handles errors.
agents.brandMemoryDesc: Stores and updates the living memory of your brand.
agents.onboardingDesc: Builds brand memory from recent posts in minutes.
agents.moderationDesc: Checks content before publishing: toxicity, risks, injections.
agents.notificationDesc: Digests, alerts and escalations to a human.

how.title: From sign-up to first AI post — 15 minutes
how.subtitle: No filling 100 fields by hand. AI figures your channel out itself.
how.s1Desc: Add our bot as an administrator to your channel — that's all it takes.
how.s2Desc: The Onboarding agent analyses your last 50 posts: tone, topics, formats, audience.
how.s3Desc: Agents propose topics and post drafts tuned to your audience.
how.s4Desc: The channel lives and grows without you — on vacation or under load. Under your control.

audience.title: For channel authors and operators
audience.subtitle: Solo expert, network owner or a business with a channel — there's value for each.
audience.a1Desc: One brand channel. Posting 3–5 times a week without burnout and without an expensive SMM hire.
audience.a2Desc: 3–10 channels, each with its own voice. Replace a team of editors with AI, 24/7.
audience.a3Desc: A personal brand as a sales funnel. The channel doesn't go silent even when you're busy.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: 7 days of full Pro access — free, no card. Then tiers by volume of work.
pricing.currencyNote: Prices shown for Russia in ₽. Belarus in Br, other countries in $. Billed in your currency.
pricing.trialNote: Every tier includes 8 AI agents, brand memory, the weekly report, autopilot modes and MFA.

finalCta.title: Free yourself from social media routine
finalCta.subtitle: Connect your Telegram channel — and in 15 minutes the AI team takes over: ideas, posts, publishing, analytics and channel growth, all in one place.
finalCta.note: Free trial · No card required · 5-minute setup

trust.title: Trusted by
trust.subtitle: Closed beta for Telegram channel authors and operators in the CIS.
trust.note: Trust over speed — a product principle

resources.title: Resources & roadmap
resources.subtitle: Help materials, the roadmap and the changelog.
resources.help1Desc: Connect a Telegram channel and get your first AI post in 15 minutes.
resources.help2Desc: How AI extracts tone of voice and topics from your recent posts.
resources.help3Desc: How «AI does it» differs from «AI proposes — you approve».

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: The essentials — onboarding covers the rest.
faq.q1: Is it safe to connect a channel?
faq.a1: You add our bot as an administrator — we work via Telegram's official Bot API. Tokens are encrypted and access can be revoked anytime.
faq.q2: How are you different from schedulers and ChatGPT?
faq.a2: It's not a scheduler or a text generator but a team of AI agents: they ideate, write, publish and analyse themselves — with memory of your brand.
faq.q3: How fast is the first post?
faq.a3: Usually 15 minutes: connect the channel, AI extracts brand memory from recent posts and proposes the first plan and drafts.
faq.a4: Three plans — Solo, Pro and Network. 7 days of full Pro access, free and without a card.
faq.a5: At launch — Telegram only. Then in order: Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, VK.
faq.q6: Does AI publish on its own or with my approval?
faq.a6: Both modes: «AI does it» and «AI proposes — you approve». Switch anytime; moderation always runs before publishing.

footer.tagline: AI operating system for social networks. Human in the loop, not the human doing the loop.

brand.title: The AI operating system for social networks
brand.tagline: Plan, publish and analyse content across every channel from one place. Analytics, ideas and scheduling on autopilot.
brand.f3: AI post ideas and drafts tuned to your brand

loginMfa.title: Two-factor authentication
loginMfa.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app or one of your recovery codes.

register.title: Sign up
register.tosAccept: I accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
register.legalIntro: By signing up, you accept the

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.description: We sent a 6-digit code to your email. Enter it below.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: If this email is registered, we'll send a reset link.
forgotPassword.submitted: If an account with this email exists, we've sent a password reset link.
forgotPassword.checkSpam: Check your inbox, including the Spam folder.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.description: Enter a new password for your account.
resetPassword.successDescription: All active sessions have been ended. Sign in with your new password.

security.title: Security
security.disabledDescription: Turn on 2FA so that signing in requires a code from your authenticator app.
security.enabledDescription: {remaining} recovery codes remaining. Regenerate if fewer than five.
security.regenerateDescription: Generate a fresh set. The old codes will stop working.
security.disableDescription: Requires your current password and a fresh code.
security.recoveryDescription: Each code can be used once. We'll show them only once — save them somewhere safe.

brands.title: Brands
brands.addQuotaBlocked: Plan brand limit reached. Upgrade your plan or ask an admin to lift the cap.
brands.makeDefaultError: Failed to switch the active brand.

account.title: Account
account.description: Manage the email address and password on your account.
account.emailCardDescription: Change the address. We'll send a 6-digit confirmation code to the new email.
account.passwordCardDescription: Update your password. Changing it ends every active session.
account.sessionsCardDescription: See the devices you're currently signed in on and revoke any you don't recognise.

password.title: Change password
password.description: Enter your current password and a new one. Changing it ends every active session.
password.errorTooShort: The new password must be at least 8 characters long.
password.successDescription: All active sessions have been ended. Redirecting you to sign in…

email.title: Change email
email.requestDescription: Enter your current password and the new email. We'll send a 6-digit code to the new address.
email.confirmDescription: We sent a code to {email}. Enter it below to finish the change.
email.successDescription: All active sessions have been ended. Redirecting you to sign in…

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Each row is a device or browser that's currently signed in. Revoke any session you don't recognise.

dashboard.welcomeToast: Welcome, {email}! Your account has been created.
dashboard.noActiveBrand: Pick a brand in the switcher to see the latest posts.

recentPosts.noActiveChannel: No channel is connected to this brand yet.
recentPosts.noPostsYet: Channel {title} has no posts yet. Wait for live ingest or run a backfill.
